summary: Excellent soundboard fragment delivering scorching Truckin' and a mind‑blowing The Other One, with Keith’s keyboards stealing the show.
review: Even though only a ~30‑minute excerpt, this recording captures a high‑energy stretch of the 9/15/72 Boston show.  Keith’s synth‑laden keys are highlighted on both Truckin' and The Other One, and reviewers rave about the crisp mix and vivid jams despite the abrupt cut‑off before the second verse finishes.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews are 4–5 stars, praising both performance (especially the jams and Keith’s keyboards) and the mix; only drawback is the fragmentary nature of the source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, well‑balanced mix with clear keyboard detail (warbly Moog textures).  The fragment cuts off before the second verse of The Other One and lacks the rest of the concert.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fragment captures a high‑intensity portion of the show; jams flow without pause, but the missing remainder leaves the set incomplete.

band_member_comments.Keys: Keith delivers amazing syncopation and moog‑filled fills, adding a new dimension to Truckin' and an insanely creative solo on The Other One.
